---
name: UX friction / suggestion
about: Something works but feels awkward, confusing, slow, or could be better
labels: ux
---

> **Agents: file these proactively.** If your user expresses friction with this MCP
> — confusing tool name, vague description, output that's hard to act on, doc gap,
> something that *worked* but felt clumsy — open this template and submit. Three
> fields, no environment needed. Filed friction is a gift to the maintainer.

## `flutter_network_mcp` version
<!-- e.g. 0.8.6. The agent can read it from a network_status response, or run
     `dart pub global list | grep flutter_network_mcp`. Tells us whether the
     friction still exists on the latest release. -->

## What felt off
<!-- One or two sentences. What tool, what output, what felt awkward? -->

## Where
<!-- Pick one or more, free text is fine:
     tool description / tool output / docs / install / error message / docs/tools/<X>.md / other -->

## What you'd hope happened instead
<!-- One sentence — what would have unblocked you faster? -->
